item.title: Thread SensorTag
item.description: v1.0 MS8607 VEML6030 # commit nRF52840 MS88SF2 MS86072 VEML6030 Schematics # Full Screen function setup_svg_panzoom(){ let params = { panEnabled: true, zoomEnabled: true, dblClickZoomEnabled: true, controlIconsEnabled: false, mouseWheelZoomEnabled: true, preventMouseEventsDefault: true, zoomScaleSensitivity: 0.6, minZoom: 0.5, maxZoom: 4, fit: true , contain: true , center: true , refreshRate: 'auto' }; let svg_pz = svgPanZoom('#svg-5e84458ca2692f9c' ,params); window["
